concerns.text: FR-006 requires a sensitivity analysis on the decision threshold for 'acceptable coverage' (sweeping thresholds and reporting variance). The plan.md Summary, Technical Context, and Complexity Tracking sections do not mention this sensitivity analysis, nor is there a corresponding task, data entity, or phase to implement it. This leaves the requirement unbacked.

SC-005 requires measuring the robustness of the 'acceptable coverage' conclusion by sweeping thresholds. As the plan lacks any mechanism to perform this sweep or record the variance in passing cases, this success criterion cannot be measured or validated.
